# Release v0.11.4

Released: 2026-03-11

## Changes Since v0.11.3

**Version Bump:** PATCH

### Changes

- fix: fetch base SHA before git diff in guard action (#196) (756f7e3)
- feat: selective versions.yml workflow triggering with guard jobs (#192) (fe245aa)
- feat: align networks template with Paseo chain spec approach (#191) (533a2e2)
- feat: use Paseo local chain spec for parachain network test (#189) (a2b84a4)
- feat: add query account information test harness (#185) (a50b80b)
- feat: add custom skills for common workflows (#188) (f4f514d)
- docs: improve CLAUDE.md with precise commands and conventions (#187) (bd6a9b9)
- Add CLAUDE.md for project guidance and commands (#186) (2f8debd)


## Compatibility

This release was tested with:
- Rust: 1.91.1
- Node.js: v20.20.0

All recipes have passed CI tests.
